What actually happened instead.

paste error here

## Environment

// minimal reproducible example

## Additional Context
Any other context or information that might be helpful.

## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked for existing issues with the same problem
- [ ] I've included all relevant environment information
- [ ] I've provided steps to reproduce the issue
- [ ] This is not a security vulnerability (if it is, see SECURITY.md)
